title: Saudi Arabian Tripe Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Saudi Arabia, made with tender tripe and a tangy sauce.

ingredients.name: Tripe
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat the oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Brown the tripe on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the tripe from the pot and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and sauté the onion until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the tangy sauce and beef broth.
Return the tripe to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 hours, or until the tripe is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
